title: Turkish Water Chestnut Kebab Doner
description: A comforting and flavorful pescatarian-friendly Turkish dish featuring water chestnut, beurre-monte, and a blend of spices, served in a kebab-doner form with a satisfying crunch and bitterness from the water chestnut.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the sliced water chestnuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the softened beurre-monte, Turkish spice blend, lemon juice, and minced garlic.
Brush the mixture onto the water chestnuts, making sure they are evenly coated.
Grill the water chestnuts for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are slightly charred and tender.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.

Assemble the kebab-doner by spreading a layer of the beurre-monte mixture onto each slice of pita bread, then topping with a few pieces of the grilled water chestnut, some sliced red onion, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Drizzle the top with olive oil and season with salt to taste.
